phrases.intent_en: Where is best Vltava river bend view
phrases.text_local: Kde je nejlepší výhled na zákrut Vltavy?
phrases.cultural_note: Viewpoints often use 'ochoz' (gallery/walkway) for the top platform.

likely_response.local: Nahoře na ochozu, směrem k západu.
likely_response.translation_en: Up on the gallery, towards the west.

responses.english: Up on the gallery, towards the west.
responses.local: Nahoře na ochozu, směrem k západu.

phrases.text_local: Kde se kupuje lístek jen na věž?
phrases.cultural_note: Czech ticket windows (pokladny) are often small, dedicated booths right at the service point.

likely_response.local: Tady u okénka, u vchodu do věže.
likely_response.translation_en: Here at the window, at the tower entrance.

responses.english: Here at the window, at the tower entrance.
responses.local: Tady u okénka, u vchodu do věže.

phrases.intent_en: Is audio guide available at tower
phrases.text_local: Je na věži k zapůjčení audio průvodce?
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are typically rented at the ticket desk or entrance of the attraction.

phrases.intent_en: Can I pay tower entry by card
phrases.cultural_note: Card acceptance is common at major Czech tourist sites, though smaller vendors may be cash-only.
